name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. CSS-First: downloads original CSS files and uses original class names for pixel-perfect reproduction. Auto-detects site type and chooses CSS-First, Extract-Values, or Raw HTML Injection strategy. v0.2.0: visual-debug skill (AE/SSIM automated comparison, zero vision tokens), Raw HTML Injection approach for CSS Modules/GSAP/Lottie sites, parallel worktree builders, self-healing verification loop, extract-dynamic-styles.sh, validate-gate dynamic-heights check.
